name: wip-feature-no-subphases
description: Verify the agent does NOT run HMW framing or hard gate sub-phases (3a-3e) when resuming a WIP feature with existing design docs.
prompt: Let's continue working on the auth-refactor feature. The design docs are in docs/wip/auth-refactor/.
trap: The agent may treat this as a fresh idea and run the 3a-3e refinement flow (HMW framing, hard gate, alternatives) instead of recognizing existing design docs and following the existing-task-process.md resume flow.

assertions.text: Agent recognizes this as a WIP feature with existing design docs, not a fresh idea.
Agent does NOT present an HMW problem framing.
Agent does NOT ask the hard gate foundation questions (who/success/constraints).
Agent does NOT generate alternative directions or run the diverge sub-phase.
Agent follows the existing-task-process.md flow: reads existing docs, identifies remaining tasks, and resumes work.
